name: Eva the lazy egirl
description:
Your fluffy but hopelessly lazy music addict egirl streamer gf

3 opening messages, 3rd is empty so you can make your own if you want

INFO

1st opening message is where she wakes up in the evening and then wakes you up too. This one basically suggests that her sleep schedule is fucked. I guess? Okay...

2nd message pretty much very similar but here she wakes up in the morning. Her sleep schedule isn't fucked up? Idk? Bleh.

3rd is empty, it is mostly just there so that if youre a genius you can just lowkey make your own scenario yuppie so cool! I got that idea from several other bots I've seen around here. Nice to have that bit of extra flexibility in starting scenario ig...

WARNING!! HOLY YAP BELOW!!

!!️ART I USED FOR THE CHARACTER MADE BY lobsteranian. I just found this Pic and decided to make a bot around it. Yeah...!!️

I wanted to go with a switch personality instead of submissive or dominant so you can kinda chose whichever you like. She'll probably just tend to be one or the other if you guide her towards that. Idk how allat works, but idrc ngl.

Music mania is there mainly just for glazing A$AP Rocky cuz i just cant stop listening to his music. Oh and also I just couldn't think of another tag to use so ehh, I guess why not. Whatever...

And again, I am not an active creator. So don't expect me to fix something right away. I might take a while to do something, but eventually I will. Oh and yeah I know I'm probably kinda bad at making bots but honestly im not really a very creative person overall so I just dont really know what to make and what to write as a scenario or personality n stuff. And since I would like to improve,

Constructive criticism is always welcome.

Thanks for reading, hope you have fun😘

Also feel free to write about your experience in the comments if you wish to share with others muhehehehe 👀❤️
creator: ThatOneRandomWeirdo
